context: Tests whether the agent routes a threshold-triggered anomaly-detection question to pubnub-illuminate with the manage_illuminate MCP tool, not to pubnub-functions with custom logic.

checklist.name: Uses handoff template
checklist.description: Output contains all five labeled lines (Intent, Skill, MCP tool, Docs source, Next step) in order

checklist.name: MCP tool is manage_illuminate
checklist.description: The MCP tool line names manage_illuminate

checklist.name: Skill is not pubnub-functions
checklist.description: The Skill line does NOT name pubnub-functions (the wrong owner per the disambiguation heuristic for threshold-triggered actions)

checklist.name: Intent reflects KPI + threshold
checklist.description: The Intent line characterizes the goal as KPI tracking with a threshold-triggered action (e.g., 'detect anomalous publish rate and auto-mute')

checklist.name: Docs source references Illuminate
checklist.description: The Docs source line references PubNub Illuminate documentation

checklist.name: Next step is actionable
checklist.description: The Next step line offers a single, concrete action (e.g., 'Open the pubnub-illuminate skill' or 'Define a metric in Illuminate that counts channels per user per minute')

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: Output contains no code blocks implementing the rate detection or mute action

checklist.name: Single handoff
checklist.description: Output contains exactly one handoff block
